blocks.text: A song of ascents. Happy are all who fear the Lord, who follow His ways.
You shall enjoy the fruit of your labors; you shall be happy and you shall prosper.
Your wife shall be like a fruitful vine within your house; your sons, like olive saplings around your table.
So shall the man who fears the Lord be blessed.
May the Lord bless you from Zion; may you share the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life,
and live to see your children’s children. May all be well with Israel!
